subcodes.first_line: O melodious dove! Verily, in praise of the Lord thou art engaged in divine glorification and tribute [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حمامه خوش الحان در ستایش حضرت پروردگار فی الحقیقه در محامد و نعوت الهیه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
